steps.title: Identify what the blank must express
steps.content: The passage frames ephemeral objects as “markers of cultural change” that can do something traditional objects “may not.” The structure reveals the blank's meaning: they can ___ shifts that traditional sources cannot (or may not) ___. The verb must mean to reveal or show.

steps.title: Match the correct word to the meaning
steps.content: Register means to show or reveal—exactly what markers do. Ephemeral objects register shifts in norms that traditional sources may not detect. Vindicate, preclude, and induce express different meanings and don't fit the context. That matches choice A — A is correct.
